The '''''Starwayman''''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Thief/Legends|stolen]] by [[Booster Terrik]]. Terrik used the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] in [[Gender/Legends|his]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operations around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

{{Ship-stub}}
